missionFrame.function: Establish Halloway as an inhabited political community and force the first distinction between recognition and exposure.
missionFrame.dramaticQuestion: Can Starfleet restore a community to the map without turning recognition into exposure?

forbiddenOutcomes: end Unseen Border from a single failed check
remove player agency from command decisions
reveal complete hidden truth without evidence

phases.title: An Inhabited Absence
phases.summary: The Aster Vale approaches a working colony whose formal civil status is evacuated and dormant.
objectives: Avoid treating the colony as an illegal object
pressures: Residents fear a complete scan and census
Hadran observers are monitoring Starfleet traffic
phases.directorPurpose: The Aster Vale approaches a working colony whose formal civil status is evacuated and dormant.
playerFacingObjectives: Avoid treating the colony as an illegal object

phases.title: Recognition Has Consequences
phases.summary: Talar and resident representatives explain that recognition would unlock aid while exposing taxes, warrants, route detail, and private economies.
objectives: Separate recognition, aid, security, and criminal questions
pressures: A relief shipment is waiting on status
phases.directorPurpose: Talar and resident representatives explain that recognition would unlock aid while exposing taxes, warrants, route detail, and private economies.
playerFacingObjectives: Separate recognition, aid, security, and criminal questions

phases.title: The Evacuation That Wasn't
phases.summary: Records, testimony, and physical infrastructure establish that the evacuation completed on paper after most residents remained.
objectives: Verify the record through more than one source
Identify immediate legal and safety effects
pressures: Some records are protected for valid reasons
A complete data transfer would expose both
phases.directorPurpose: Records, testimony, and physical infrastructure establish that the evacuation completed on paper after most residents remained.
playerFacingObjectives: Verify the record through more than one source
Identify immediate legal and safety effects

phases.title: Public or Protected
phases.summary: The player chooses full restoration, protected recognition, continued obscurity, or withdrawal while defining what Starfleet will record.
pressures: Hadran attention increases with public recognition
Continued absence preserves abuse as well as safety
phases.directorPurpose: The player chooses full restoration, protected recognition, continued obscurity, or withdrawal while defining what Starfleet will record.

phases.title: A Colony Returns Differently
phases.summary: The chosen status is implemented and Halloway becomes a continuing location, ally, adversary, or closed port in the open world.
objectives: Commit the status and immediate effects
Identify the next Halden or chart lead
pressures: Implementation matters more than the wording
The colony remains part of the March after the mission
phases.directorPurpose: The chosen status is implemented and Halloway becomes a continuing location, ally, adversary, or closed port in the open world.
playerFacingObjectives: Commit the status and immediate effects
Identify the next Halden or chart lead

decisionPoints.stakes: Aid; access; resident consent; legal exposure

decisionPoints.optionsPolicy: Freeform command intent; any listed approaches are examples only.

commandDecisions.title: Halloway Interim Status
